body.title: agent_datacenter: browser-use device (gated on eval spike go verdict)
body.description:
BrowserUseDevice implementation. Spec TBD at implementation time based on T-adc-browser-use-eval-spike findings. Gated — do not sprint until spike returns a go verdict.

Proposed shape:
- Determined by spike results. Likely:
  agent_datacenter/devices/browser_use/device.py: BrowserUseDevice(BaseDevice)
  capabilities() determined by spike question 1
  restart() semantics determined by spike question 3

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/browser_use/ (new, post-spike)

Design rules:
- oop-first: BrowserUseDevice class; full BaseDevice contract

Scope boundary:
IN: BrowserUseDevice implementing full contract per spike findings
OUT: any spec beyond what spike determines

Test plan:
- TBD per spike. At minimum: BrowserUseDevice() instantiates; passes contract test suite
